title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Dice Horde**
*2026*
Roll & Write meets Tower Defense!
![Dice Horde](toplist_images/bgg_0b1a59aa.jpg)

2. **Concordia**
*2013*
Merchants build and trade throughout the Roman Empire to please the Gods.
![Concordia](toplist_images/bgg_9688b256.jpg)

3. **Limit**
*2025*
Lead your nation in the world system.
![Limit](toplist_images/bgg_fdb70d23.jpg)

4. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](toplist_images/bgg_c6fa2d1e.png)

5. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](toplist_images/bgg_d30dff6b.jpg)

6. **Brass: Pittsburgh**
*2026*
Take part in the United States' late 19th-century industrial boom.
![Brass: Pittsburgh](toplist_images/bgg_e48c29cb.jpg)

7. **Labyrinth: Chronicles**
*2026*
New take on the all-time classic. Explore the 3D Labyrinth, and help the villagers!
![Labyrinth: Chronicles](toplist_images/bgg_a6ea1ebc.png)

8. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](toplist_images/bgg_81bcc807.jpg)

9. **Cozy Stickerville**
*2026*
Build your village with over 800 stickers! 
![Cozy Stickerville](toplist_images/bgg_469286c9.png)

10. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](toplist_images/bgg_fdbdd58c.png)

11. **Speakeasy**
*2025*
Earn money running a Manhattan speakeasy business during Prohibition.
![Speakeasy](toplist_images/bgg_733d08df.jpg)

12. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](toplist_images/bgg_770b31aa.png)

13. **Concordia: Special Edition**
*2027*
Merchants build and trade throughout the Roman Empire to please the Gods.
![Concordia: Special Edition](toplist_images/bgg_f41596b8.jpg)

14. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](toplist_images/bgg_5776d047.jpg)

15. **Sanibel**
*2026*
Collect seashells that come and go with the tide on the beaches of Sanibel.
![Sanibel](toplist_images/bgg_b8084627.jpg)

16. **Almighty**
*2027*
Perform mighty acts upon hapless mortals to earn belief and glory.
![Almighty](toplist_images/bgg_6e138504.png)

17. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](toplist_images/bgg_cd0d56bb.png)

18. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](toplist_images/bgg_e953ff0c.jpg)

19. **High Frontier 4 All**
*2020*
Use real rocket science in a race to industrialize the solar system.
![High Frontier 4 All](toplist_images/bgg_0cf044ed.png)

20. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](toplist_images/bgg_4562530d.png)

21. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](toplist_images/bgg_696ad0bc.jpg)

22. **Heat: Rocky Roads**
*2026*
Get ready to race in Germany and South Africa.
![Heat: Rocky Roads](toplist_images/bgg_330ec30a.jpg)

23. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](toplist_images/bgg_f40af56c.png)

24. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*2020*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](toplist_images/bgg_a82bea0b.jpg)

25. **Endeavor: Deep Sea**
*2024*
Lead your research institute to explore ocean depths and publish your findings!
![Endeavor: Deep Sea](toplist_images/bgg_f38edaba.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*13 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](toplist_images/bgg_6c6097b4.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*21 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](toplist_images/bgg_5d1e3a96.png)

3. **Castle Combo**
*16 months on the list*
Combine Medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](toplist_images/bgg_1f63175b.png)

4. **Ark Nova**
*49 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](toplist_images/bgg_4b64ef55.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*85 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](toplist_images/bgg_bb399260.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*9 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](toplist_images/bgg_7919c235.png)

7. **Azul**
*99 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](toplist_images/bgg_b290df80.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*112 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](toplist_images/bgg_6fb62e57.jpg)

9. **Forest Shuffle**
*28 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](toplist_images/bgg_e4cbadf9.jpg)

10. **Cascadia**
*54 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](toplist_images/bgg_e8a37a88.jpg)

11. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*14 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](toplist_images/bgg_175170b7.jpg)

12. **Sky Team**
*28 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](toplist_images/bgg_d0328fb6.jpg)

13. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*31 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](toplist_images/bgg_640b79ca.jpg)

14. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*38 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](toplist_images/bgg_1f667fca.png)

15. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*61 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](toplist_images/bgg_be3e4a7f.jpg)

16. **Faraway**
*21 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](toplist_images/bgg_ea6ec04e.png)

17. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*7 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](toplist_images/bgg_d72a66c9.png)

18. **Agent Avenue**
*1 months on the list*
Retired spies in a suburban neighborhood race to discover each other's secrets.
![Agent Avenue](toplist_images/bgg_d72be88e.png)

19. **The Gang**
*7 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](toplist_images/bgg_a938a107.jpg)

20. **Carcassonne**
*271 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](toplist_images/bgg_7e398512.jpg)

21. **The White Castle**
*27 months on the list*
Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.
![The White Castle](toplist_images/bgg_9da8f096.jpg)

22. **Splendor**
*141 months on the list*
Renaissance merchants race to grab gems, acquire property, and please nobility.
![Splendor](toplist_images/bgg_97e47a3c.png)

23. **The Lord of the Rings: Duel for Middle-earth**
*13 months on the list*
Play as the Fellowship or Sauron and attempt to determine the fate of Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Duel for Middle-earth](toplist_images/bgg_3d3c51c0.jpg)

24. **Take Time**
*2 months on the list*
Time beckons you to discover a multitude of challenging universes.
![Take Time](toplist_images/bgg_429b2fda.png)

25. **SCOUT**
*40 months on the list*
Poach your opponents' artists and outdo each other's circus shows.
![SCOUT](toplist_images/bgg_0b0fc8be.png)
author: boardgamegeek.com
